descriptionShort: Matt Harvey (Boston Bruins) vs Perry Anderson (San Jose Sharks) NHL game footage from March 23, 1992.
descriptionLong: Professional hockey game footage from March 23, 1992, featuring two Sockeyes alumni playing in the NHL: Matt Harvey for the Boston Bruins and Perry Anderson for the San Jose Sharks. This archival video captures their pro careers in early 1990s professional hockey at the highest level.
